CREATE TABLE Events (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_name VARCHAR(255), event_time TIME);
INSERT INTO Events (event_name, event_time) VALUES ('Morning Meeting', '09:00:00');
INSERT INTO Events (event_name, event_time) VALUES ('Lunch Break', '12:30:00');
INSERT INTO Events (event_name, event_time) VALUES ('Afternoon Review', '15:45:00');
INSERT INTO Events (event_name, event_time) VALUES ('Evening Wrap-Up', '18:00:00');
SELECT event_name FROM Events WHERE event_time BETWEEN '09:00:00' AND '17:00:00';
SELECT event_name, event_time FROM Events WHERE event_time = (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM Events);
SELECT E1.event_name FROM Events E1 WHERE E1.event_time < (SELECT AVG(event_time) FROM Events);
SELECT E1.event_name, E2.event_name FROM Events E1 JOIN Events E2 ON E1.event_time < E2.event_time;
SELECT event_name FROM Events WHERE event_time >= '00:00:00' AND event_time <= '23:59:59';
CREATE TABLE TimeLogs (log_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, log_time TIME);
SELECT * FROM TimeLogs WHERE log_time IN (SELECT event_time FROM Events);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Events WHERE event_time IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM Events WHERE event_time BETWEEN '08:00:00' AND '17:00:00' ORDER BY event_time DESC;
SELECT E.event_name FROM Events E WHERE E.event_time = (SELECT MIN(log_time) FROM TimeLogs);
